testcase.name: tests.Unit.Application.test_paypal_adaptor
testcase.error: tests/Unit/Application/test_paypal_adaptor.py:3: in <module> from modules.Application.PluginAdaptors.PayPal.PayPalPluginAdaptor import PayPalPluginAdaptor modules/Application/PluginAdaptors/PayPal/PayPalPluginAdaptor.py:6: in <module> from modules.Application.PluginAdaptors.PayPal.CreateOrder.CreateOrderRequest import CreateOrderRequest modules/Application/PluginAdaptors/PayPal/CreateOrder/CreateOrderRequest.py:1: in <module> from modules.Application.PluginAdaptors.PayPal.PayPalHTTPMixin import PayPalHTTPMixin modules/Application/PluginAdaptors/PayPal/PayPalHTTPMixin.py:1: in <module> from modules.Application.PluginAdaptors.HTTPMixin import HTTPMixin modules/Application/PluginAdaptors/HTTPMixin.py:7: in <module> class HTTPMixin(ABC): modules/Application/PluginAdaptors/HTTPMixin.py:38: in HTTPMixin def _process_response(response: requests_futures.sessions.Response) -> dict: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'requests_futures.sessions' has no attribute 'Response'
